title: pentacalia ledifolia var. lanata
intro: Pentacalia ledifolia var. lanata, also known as Woolly Pentacalia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico and Central America, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. To harness its benefits, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in traditional herbal remedies.
